/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/zibby_api_server_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/zibby_api_server_test.dir/unit/api_server_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zibby_api_server_test.dir/__/src/api/api_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zibby_api_server_test.dir/__/src/core/database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zibby_api_server_test.dir/__/src/core/message.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zibby_api_server_test.dir/__/src/core/profile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zibby_api_server_test.dir/__/src/core/crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zibby_api_server_test.dir/__/src/core/network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zibby_api_server_test.dir/__/src/utils/logger.cpp.o -o zibby_api_server_test  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0
